posts.author: Dimkleid (Dimosthenis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

More flexibility to include additional columns from your Products board in the quote table
• A way to calculate pricing based on units per box (e.g. Price × Units per Box × Quantity)
• The ability to display product images directly within the quote

What are you trying to achieve

Manage my quotes within my CRM instead of using excel and properly create deals.
